class.name: CountryData
class.brief_description: Parses all data in the specified folders.
class.description: Parses all files specified in the given folders and creates typed dictionaries for fast lookups. This is used by the inspector as well as the runtime logic.

method.name: export_color_data
method.description: Exports color information of a country to file.

method.name: get_country_provinces
method.description: Gets all provinces associated with the country id. It will return a string that is indented to be displayed by the inspector with the name and ID of the province.

method.name: parse_all_files
method.description: Parses all files from the folder paths specified. The data is stored in dictionaries for fast lookups.

method.name: populate_color_map_buffers
method.description: Function used to create a buffer data for creating a color map texture with compute shaders.

members.member: Path for the files that contain country names and color.
Path for the files that contain country names and their IDs (like AAC).
Dictionary with country id (like AAC) to color.
Dictionary with country id (like AAC) to their name.
Dictionary with country name to their color.
Dictionary with province id, that is represented as a number, to their name.
Dictionary with province id, that is represented as a number, to their country owner. The owner is equivalent to the country ID (like AAC).
Path for the files that contain province names, IDs and their country owners (equivalent to country IDs).

Maps terrain type names to their display colors. Used to assign colors to unowned provinces such as oceans, lakes, wastelands, and colonizable territories. Provinces matching ocean keywords are colored accordingly, while other unowned provinces use the "No Owner" color.
